supportAreas.title: Formulation and troubleshooting
supportAreas.description: Work through stability, compatibility, and performance issues with practical next-step guidance.

supportAreas.title: Development testing strategy
supportAreas.description: Define chemistry and microbiology checks that inform development decisions before launch.

supportAreas.title: Readiness planning
supportAreas.description: Prepare for scale-up, documentation, and handoff into commercial testing.

engagementSignals.title: Recurring formulation issues
engagementSignals.description: You are seeing drift in appearance, pH, odor, viscosity, or preservative performance and need a structured troubleshooting path.

engagementSignals.title: Pre-launch uncertainty
engagementSignals.description: You need development-stage testing plans and checkpoints before locking labels, claims, or release timelines.

engagementSignals.title: Transition to routine testing
engagementSignals.description: You are preparing to move from R&D work into repeatable analytical, microbiology, or stability testing support.

supportOutputs.title: Development support summary
supportOutputs.description: A practical record of issues observed, actions taken, and next-step options for your internal team.

supportOutputs.title: Testing roadmap
supportOutputs.description: Recommended chemistry, microbiology, and stability checkpoints aligned to your current development stage.

supportOutputs.title: Readiness checklist
supportOutputs.description: A focused list of technical and documentation priorities to address before commercial release testing.

supportOutputs.title: Handoff coordination
supportOutputs.description: Defined scope notes that make the shift into Testing Services faster and easier to execute.

engagementModes.title: Early-stage brands
engagementModes.description: Support for first products and a clearer path from concept to testing.

engagementModes.title: Growing product lines
engagementModes.description: Guidance on reformulation, investigation, and development-stage verification.

engagementModes.title: Established manufacturers
engagementModes.description: Targeted technical support for improvement projects and launch preparation.

testingConnection.summary: Product Development helps define what to test and when; Testing Services executes those plans for release, investigation, and ongoing quality support.
steps: Define development objectives and known risks
Select priority analytical, microbiology, and stability checks
Run development-stage testing and review results
Finalize scope for routine or release-focused Testing Services
